RULING:
DEFENDANT CONTRA COSTA ELECTRIC, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Contra Costa Electric, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant did not satisfy its burden of production that plaintiff does not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that he was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials disturbed by defendant. Plaintiff's deposition testimony and written discovery responses preclude defendant from successfully invoking the factually devoid prong of Aguilar. Order signed in open court.
